_comment: Human/audit-curated coordinate overrides, keyed by the place slug produced by extraction. Checked by 09_geocode.mjs before Nominatim. Each entry cites why.

church-near-upper-cantref-farm-powys-wal.name: St Brynach's Church, Llanfrynach
church-near-upper-cantref-farm-powys-wal.reason: Audit (d) 2026-06-12: the diary's Sunday Evensong was at the village church next to Upper Cantref Farm (A_0151_L); Nominatim had placed it ~40 km away in the Beacons.

vigeland-sculpture-park-oslo-norway.name: Vigeland Sculpture Park (Frognerparken), Oslo
vigeland-sculpture-park-oslo-norway.reason: Nominatim free-text misses the English name; the park is Vigelandsparken in Frognerparken, Oslo.

llangynach-powys-wales-uk.name: Llanfrynach
llangynach-powys-wales-uk.reason: Audit (d) 2026-06-12: margin annotation on A_0150_R reads 'Llanfrynach' (transcribed as '[?Llangynach]'), the village adjacent to Cantref also visited on the Monday.
